query:
INSERT INTO `system_settings` (`key`, `value`, `description`) VALUES
  ('generation_paused', 'false', 'Global pause switch for content generation worker'),
  ('publishing_paused', 'false', 'Global pause switch for publishing worker'),
  ('ads_paused', 'false', 'Global pause switch for ad serving'),
  ('daily_spend_limit_usd', '5.00', 'Maximum LLM spend per day in USD'),
  ('min_publish_score', '75', 'Minimum publish_score threshold for page approval'),
  ('min_safety_score', '95', 'Minimum safety_score threshold for page approval'),
  ('min_usefulness_score', '75', 'Minimum usefulness_score threshold for page approval'),
  ('min_readability_score', '70', 'Minimum readability_score threshold for page approval'),
  ('bot_score_ad_cutoff', '60', 'Sessions with bot_score >= this value do not receive ads'),
  ('max_retry_count', '2', 'Maximum number of retries for failed generation jobs'),
  ('topic_discovery_interval_minutes', '30', 'How often the topic discovery worker runs'),
  ('refresh_threshold_days', '30', 'Pages older than this with declining traffic are refreshed'),
  ('archive_threshold_days', '90', 'Pages older than this with zero traffic are archived'),
  ('m0_validated', 'true', 'Milestone 0 validation status'),
  ('m1_status', 'in_progress', 'Milestone 1 build status')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
